meta.title: Proxmox Commands Reference — qm, pct, vzdump, zpool, pveversion | ProxMenux
meta.description: Curated reference of essential Proxmox VE and Linux commands organised by topic: system inspection, VM and LXC management (qm / pct), storage and disks, networking, updates, GPU passthrough, ZFS, backup and restore, and day-to-day CLI tools.
meta.ogTitle: Proxmox Commands Reference — qm, pct, vzdump, zpool
meta.ogDescription: Curated reference of the most useful Proxmox VE and Linux commands, grouped by topic — system, VM/CT, storage, network, updates, GPU passthrough, ZFS, backup and CLI tools.
meta.twitterDescription: Curated reference of the most useful Proxmox VE and Linux commands, grouped by topic.

header.title: Help and Info
header.description: Curated compendium of useful Linux and Proxmox VE commands organised by topic. Nine categories — covers everything from a quick pveversion check to a multi-line zfs send/receive — meant to live alongside the GPU, disk and share sections of ProxMenux as a one-stop reference.

intro.title: What this is
intro.body: A reference catalog of the commands you actually use on a Proxmox host, grouped by topic. Inside ProxMenux you can pick a number to run a command directly or paste your own at the prompt; on this site each category is a copy-paste table.

opening.heading: Opening the menu
opening.body: From ProxMenux's main menu, press <kbd>h</kbd>. You will see this:
opening.imageAlt: Help and Info menu with 9 categories of commands

options.title: Useful System Commands
options.description: pveversion, uptime, free, journalctl, hostnamectl, current-user info, lynis audit, fastfetch.

options.title: VM and CT Management
options.description: qm list / config / start / stop / migrate, pct list / config / enter, snapshots, cloning.

options.title: Storage and Disks
options.description: lsblk, blkid, smartctl, mount info, pvesm status, LVM commands.

options.title: Network Commands
options.description: ip / ss / nmcli, bridge inspection, ping / traceroute, DNS lookups, fail2ban-client.

options.title: Updates and Packages
options.description: apt update / dist-upgrade, apt-cache policy, dpkg queries, repo file checks.

options.title: GPU Passthrough
options.description: lspci / dmesg checks, IOMMU enablement verification, vfio-pci binding, GPU usage from the host.

options.title: ZFS Management
options.description: zpool / zfs commands for status, datasets, snapshots, send/receive, ARC tuning, trimming.

options.title: Backup and Restore
options.description: vzdump, qmrestore / pct restore, Proxmox Backup Server helpers, snapshot operations.

options.title: System CLI Tools
options.description: tmux, screen, htop / btop, ncdu, jq, dig, lsof, watch — daily-driver admin tools.

tip.title: Searchable from the global search
tip.body: Every command in these pages is indexed by the documentation search. If you remember a flag or fragment but not which page it's on, hit the search bar at the top — you'll land directly on the right entry.
